name: docx-search-app
description: Search through DOCX files with diacritic-insensitive search

scripts.build:docs: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const mammoth=require('mammoth'); (async()=>{ const dir=process.cwd(); const files=fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(f=>f.toLowerCase().endsWith('.docx')).sort(); const docs=[]; for(const file of files){ const result=await mammoth.extractRawText({path:path.join(dir,file)}); docs.push({fileName:file, content:result.value||''}); } fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,'documents.json'), JSON.stringify({generatedAt:new Date().toISOString(), documents:docs}, null, 2)); console.log('Generated documents.json with', docs.length, 'documents'); })().catch(err=>{ console.error(err); process.exit(1); });"
